title: XXE — XML eXternal Entity
description: InvoiceLab ingests XML invoices with external-entity resolution enabled. Exfiltrate /flag.txt via an XXE entity reference.

hints.text: Define a !ENTITY referencing file:///flag.txt and use it inside any of the invoice fields the response echoes back.
Whichever element appears in the JSON response (vendor / amount / note) is your exfil channel. Reference the entity inside it: <vendor>&xxe;</vendor>.
